## Page Section / Title
Index  
VISUAL IDENTITY  

## All Verbatim Text
- Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox  
- Index  
- VISUAL IDENTITY

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: A small, stylized logo (appears as a geometric icon) is present in the top-right corner. No detailed construction rules are visible on this page.  
- **Color palette**: No color swatches or values are shown.  
- **Typography**:  
  - Main heading: "Index" (bold, large sans-serif).  
  - Subheading: "VISUAL IDENTITY" (regular weight, smaller sans-serif).  
  - List items: Bullet points in a regular sans-serif typeface.  
- **Imagery / photography**: None.  
- **Iconography**: A small geometric icon (likely the brand logo) in the top-right corner.  
- **Layout grid**: Two-column grid for the list items (left column: 7 items; right column: 5 items).  
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: None.  

## Page Layout Summary
The page has a clean, minimal layout with a top header (brand name and logo) and a central section containing the "Index" heading and two columns of list items. The text is left-aligned, with the heading centered above the list.  

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
No explicit do/don't rules or usage guidelines are printed on this page. The page serves as an index of sections in the brand guidelines.
